description_long: This is a large, L-shaped modular lounge set featuring a combination of blue and brown upholstered sections, arranged around a pair of white marble-topped coffee tables. The main seating area is upholstered in blue with vertical channel tufting, complemented by three large, loose light gray cushions for added comfort. A brown upholstered bench section sits perpendicular to the main blue seating, providing additional seating or a visual accent. Integrated into one end of the lounge is a wooden side table with a black metal frame, supporting a white cylindrical decorative object. The lounge sits on short, black legs that slightly elevate it above the ground, giving it a modern, urban aesthetic. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, geometric forms, and a mix of soft and hard materials.
description: A modern L-shaped lounge with blue and brown channel-tufted upholstery, loose gray cushions, and an integrated wood-and-metal side table, arranged around white marble coffee tables.
description_view_0: The blue L-shaped lounge dominates the view, with the brown bench and white marble tables visible in the background; the integrated side table and decorative object are clearly seen on the right.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the blue seating, the wooden side table with its white object, and the alignment of the brown bench with the marble tables.
description_view_2: From above, the full L-shaped configuration is visible, showing the arrangement of cushions, the placement of the brown bench, and the central marble tables.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the back of the blue lounge, the brown bench, and the marble tables, with the wooden side table extending along the right side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions in light gray are placed along the blue seating sections; seat cushions are integrated and channel-tufted, with no visible loose seat cushions; no cushions on the brown bench.
attribute_backrest_design: Tall, straight backrests with vertical channel tufting, uniform height, and a squared, modern profile; no visible headrests or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present at the ends of the blue sections, straight, padded, and matching the backrest height; no armrests on the brown bench.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, black legs, minimally visible, likely metal, providing slight elevation and a modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with vertical channel tufting on both seat and backrest surfaces; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
